item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 30, 2026
item.description:
Hey there. If you're running or building an AI services business right now, there's a pretty significant shift happening in how agencies are packaging and selling solutions to SMBs. And it's worth understanding because the window to adapt your positioning is closing faster than you might think.
Let...

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 25, 2026
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back. Today we're looking at something that's genuinely shifted in the agency AI space over the last week or two, and it's worth paying close attention to because it changes how you should be thinking about positioning your services.

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 23, 2026
item.description:
Hey, welcome back. Let's talk about what's actually happening in the AI services space right now, because it's shifted in a really important way and I think a lot of agencies haven't noticed yet.

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 18, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We're looking at the AI services marketplace today, and there's something pretty significant happening right now: the entire value proposition of what agencies sell has fundamentally shifted.
